responsibilities: Design and develop flight controller software and autopilot logic for stable and reliable unmanned aerial vehicle operation
Integrate and calibrate GPS, IMU, barometer, and other sensors to achieve accurate state estimation during flight
Implement and tune PID and other control algorithms to ensure stable attitude, altitude, and position hold performance
Develop autonomous flight path planning and waypoint navigation features using MAVLink-based ground control communication protocols
Conduct simulated flight testing using Gazebo and software-in-the-loop environments to validate flight software before real-world flights
Perform field flight testing and telemetry analysis to diagnose and resolve flight stability and performance issues
Collaborate with mechanical engineers to optimize airframe design, weight distribution, and propulsion system selection for flight efficiency
Ensure drone systems comply with relevant aviation safety regulations and operational guidelines for commercial and research flights
Design and implement battery management and power distribution systems to maximize flight time and operational safety
